title: silent message loss during reconnect window has no caller signal
description: transport.rs RelayConnRetry: when the 64-message outbound channel fills during a disconnect, excess sends return Err(SendError) which the caller must handle — but there is no ClientEvent::MessageDropped to signal loss to application code that successfully called tx.send() before the channel filled. Callers cannot distinguish delivered messages from silently queued-and-dropped ones. At-most-once delivery is intentional but the lack of explicit loss notification is a latent correctness risk for callers that assume send success implies eventual delivery.
